prompt: My 3D forge validator is reporting a bounding box of 156000x156000x8500mm and failing the mechanical check, even though the model I produced is just a small chess piece. The validator script connects to Blender MCP and runs getMeshData(). The concept file says the piece should be about 50mm tall. What's going wrong and how do I fix the asset-validator.js?

assertions.text: Identifies root cause as measuring stale/wrong Blender scene
Explains scene persistence gotcha after producer disconnects
Python code in fix uses single quotes only
